column1: # ESP32-P4 partition table — 16 MB flash (M5Stack Tab5).
# The Tab5's ESP32-C6 WiFi co-processor runs esp_hosted *slave* firmware that
# must be stored on the P4's flash and loaded over SDIO at boot. We reserve a
#   nvs       24 KB   - WiFi creds + runtime config (KVS)
#   slave_fw  2 MB    - ESP32-C6 esp_hosted slave firmware image
